name: Rotelli Pasta w/ Menonita & Pasilla Cream Sauce
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces Cacique brand Menonita Cheese, shredded
1 pound rotelli pasta, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare the sauce by blending together pasilla chilies, garlic, cilantro, and lime juice with crema salvadoreña. Add salt and pepper to taste. Heat the mixture slowly until warm.
3. Place cooked pasta in individual oven-safe bowls.
4. Pour the heated sauce over the pasta.
5. Sprinkle shredded Menonita cheese on top.
6. Bake for approximately 8 minutes, or until the cheese is melted.
